definition: A set of pages with words or pictures
sentence: I read a book before bed.

definition: An animal that lives in water
sentence: The fish swam in the pond.

definition: A white drink from cows
sentence: She drank a glass of milk.

definition: A table used for reading or writing
sentence: He sat at his desk to do homework.

definition: A group of musicians or a strip of material
sentence: The band played a fun song.

definition: A light material used to seal bottles
sentence: He popped the cork off the bottle.

definition: Tiny dry particles on surfaces
sentence: She wiped the dust off the shelf.

definition: A sport played with clubs and a ball
sentence: Dad loves to play golf on weekends.

definition: To give aid or assistance
sentence: Can you help me carry this box?

definition: A sudden bump or shock
sentence: The bus hit a bump and gave us a jolt.

definition: A round handle on a door or drawer
sentence: Turn the knob to open the door.

definition: Good fortune or chance
sentence: She found a penny for good luck.

definition: A light fog or fine spray of water
sentence: The morning mist covered the fields.

definition: A device that moves liquid or air
sentence: Use the pump to fill the tire with air.

definition: A smooth soft fabric
sentence: The scarf was made of smooth silk.

definition: A device that gives light
sentence: Turn on the lamp please.

definition: To push yourself up into the air
sentence: He can jump very high.

definition: The part of your body at the end of your arm
sentence: She raised her hand in class.

definition: To mix things together
sentence: Blend the fruit to make a smoothie.

definition: A tool that holds things together tightly
sentence: Use a clamp to hold the pieces together.

definition: To move slowly without control
sentence: The boat began to drift down the river.

definition: A thin layer of ice on surfaces
sentence: There was frost on the window this morning.

definition: To hold something firmly
sentence: She tried to grasp the rope tightly.

definition: A long flat piece of wood
sentence: He walked across the wooden plank.

definition: A warm blanket made of stitched layers
sentence: Grandma made a colorful quilt for my bed.

definition: A flat board for storing things
sentence: Put the books back on the shelf.

definition: Past tense of sting; pricked by an insect
sentence: The bee stung him on the arm.

definition: To move in a spinning pattern
sentence: Watch the paint swirl in the water.

definition: A device used to slow or stop
sentence: Press the brake to stop the bicycle.

definition: Firm, crunchy, and fresh
sentence: The apple was crisp and delicious.

definition: A living thing that grows in soil
sentence: We plant a flower in the garden.

definition: A large bird or a machine for lifting
sentence: The crane lifted the heavy box.

definition: A device used for cooking food
sentence: Dad cooked dinner on the stove.

definition: Sandy shore by the ocean
sentence: We built sandcastles at the beach.

definition: A sweet treat made with sugar
sentence: She shared her candy with her friends.

definition: A soft white stick used for writing
sentence: The teacher wrote on the board with chalk.

definition: A small round fruit that grows in bunches
sentence: She picked a purple grape from the vine.

definition: A tool with a sharp blade for cutting
sentence: Use a knife to cut the bread.

definition: A round gem found inside an oyster
sentence: The necklace had a shiny pearl.

definition: A female ruler of a kingdom
sentence: The queen wore a golden crown.

definition: A portable light or flame
sentence: He used a torch to see in the cave.

definition: A small clock worn on the wrist
sentence: She checked the time on her watch.

definition: The planet we live on
sentence: Earth is the third planet from the sun.

definition: Something very large or a huge person
sentence: The giant sunflower grew taller than me.

definition: A very large body of salt water
sentence: Whales live in the ocean.

definition: Ready to face danger without fear
sentence: The brave knight saved the village.

definition: To rest on top of water
sentence: The leaf will float on the river.

definition: A large strong building with towers
sentence: The king lived in a grand castle.

definition: A mythical fire-breathing creature
sentence: The dragon guarded the treasure.

definition: A large area covered with trees
sentence: The deer ran into the forest.

definition: An armored soldier from the Middle Ages
sentence: The knight rode a white horse.

definition: A round citrus fruit or a color
sentence: She peeled an orange for a snack.

definition: An outdoor meal
sentence: We had a picnic in the park.

definition: A small furry animal with long ears
sentence: The rabbit hopped across the lawn.

definition: A shiny gray precious metal
sentence: She wore a silver bracelet.

definition: A piece of paper allowing entry or travel
sentence: He bought a ticket for the show.

definition: A prize given for winning
sentence: The team won a shiny gold trophy.

definition: A soft white fiber used to make cloth
sentence: This shirt is made of cotton.

definition: A sheltered place where ships anchor
sentence: The boats rested in the harbor.

definition: A soft fabric with a smooth texture
sentence: The curtains were made of red velvet.

definition: A structure built over a river or road
sentence: We walked across the bridge to the park.

definition: Turned into ice or very cold
sentence: The lake was frozen in winter.

definition: A piece of land where plants are grown
sentence: She grows tomatoes in the garden.

definition: A container made of woven material
sentence: She carried a basket of apples.

definition: A desert plant with spines
sentence: The cactus stores water inside its stem.

definition: A fast bird of prey
sentence: The falcon soared above the valley.

definition: A tool used for hitting nails
sentence: He used a hammer to build a birdhouse.

definition: A small animal with six legs
sentence: A ladybug is a tiny insect.

definition: A thick tropical forest
sentence: Monkeys swing through the jungle trees.

definition: An object that attracts metal
sentence: The magnet stuck to the fridge door.

definition: A small bag sewn into clothing
sentence: He put the coins in his pocket.

definition: A vehicle that flies into space
sentence: The rocket blasted off into the sky.

definition: Good judgment and knowledge
sentence: Grandpa shared his wisdom with us.

definition: A fight between groups
sentence: The two armies prepared for battle.

definition: A group of people or animals living together
sentence: The ant colony worked together to gather food.

definition: A place where people buy and sell things
sentence: We bought fruit at the market.

definition: The coldest season of the year
sentence: Snow falls in winter.

definition: The leader of a team or ship
sentence: The captain steered the ship through the storm.

definition: A smart ocean mammal
sentence: The dolphin jumped out of the water.

definition: The state of being free
sentence: The bird enjoyed its freedom in the sky.

definition: A trip from one place to another
sentence: They began a long journey to the mountains.

definition: A lamp with a protective case
sentence: She hung a lantern to light the porch.

definition: A scary or imaginary creature
sentence: The friendly monster lived under the bed.

definition: Something that is hard to explain
sentence: The missing key was a real mystery.

definition: Without any mistakes or flaws
sentence: She scored a perfect ten in the contest.

definition: Something that needs to be solved
sentence: He worked hard to solve the math problem.

definition: An arc of colors in the sky after rain
sentence: A rainbow appeared after the storm.

definition: A place that gives protection
sentence: They found shelter from the rain under a tree.

definition: A light covering on a bird's body
sentence: She found a blue feather on the ground.

definition: A warm covering used on beds
sentence: He pulled the blanket over himself.
